prompt: I need to create a project.yaml config for a new Go microservice called 'order-service'. It should have a REST API generated from OpenAPI spec (api.swagger.yml), a Kafka producer that sends order_created and order_updated events with typed messages from JSON Schema, and a sys endpoint for metrics. The git repo is github.com/mycompany/order-service. Please write the complete project.yaml.

assertions.text: Has main section with name: order-service, logger, registry_type
Has git section with repo and module_path
Has REST ogen transport with path to swagger
Has sys transport with template generator
Has jsonschema section for typed messages
Has kafka producer with events referencing jsonschema
Has application with transport in object format and kafka ref
Transport uses object format (- name: x) not string format
All defined entities are used in applications
